arts.ttl: Carlisle United sign Manchester United striker Joe Hugill
arts.sum: CARLISLE United have announced the signing of striker Joe Hugill on loan from Manchester United until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United boss on Bradford test, Cook absence and familiar face
arts.sum: Mike Williamson insists Bradford City’s loss of Andy Cook will not alter their approach against Carlisle United.

arts.ttl: Sheffield Wednesday considering offer for Bradford City prospect
arts.sum: Sheffield Wednesday have brought Freddy Jeffreys in on trial and could offer him a contract, according to The… The post Sheffield Wednesday considering offer for Bradford City prospect appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'I am looking forward to kicking on here.' - McArthur after joining Carlisle United
arts.sum: CHARLIE McArthur has said he is 'looking forward' to playing for Carlisle United after joining the Blues on loan from Newcastle United until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Dummett on joining Carlisle United - and the ex-Blue who urged him to sign
arts.sum: INTERVIEW: The defender talks about joining the Blues, the friend who urged him to sign, Mike Williamson and Carlisle's survival fight.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United announce loan signing of Newcastle United defender Charlie McArthur
arts.sum: CARLISLE United have announced the signing of defender Charlie McArthur on loan from Newcastle United until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United midfielder Neal joins Fleetwood
arts.sum: Carlisle United midfielder Harrison Neal has left the Blues - to join League Two rivals Fleetwood Town.

arts.ttl: Sell-out! 1,000+ support for Carlisle United at Fleetwood
arts.sum: Carlisle United have announced a sell-out away support for their next game on the road in League Two at Fleetwood Town.
